title: Annual Statement — Tax Year Summary & Email to Landlord

content.intro: The annual statement in RentGoose provides a full UK tax year summary covering all rental income across your properties. This is useful for self-assessment tax returns.

sections.title: How to Generate an Annual Statement

steps.title: Open the Financial View
steps.content: Find the property or tenancy and click View to open the financial summary.

steps.title: Click Annual Statement
steps.content: Click the 'Annual Statement' button. A modal window opens showing the full tax year summary.

steps.title: Review the Summary
steps.content: The annual statement modal displays: gross rental income for the tax year across all your properties, a breakdown by property, and totals for the period.

steps.title: Download the Statement
steps.content: Download the statement as a CSV or PDF for your records. You can pass this to your accountant for self-assessment purposes.

sections.title: UK Tax Year Coverage
sections.content: Annual statements cover the UK tax year: 6 April to 5 April. Pass the statement to your accountant or tax advisor for self-assessment. The statement is suitable for use as supporting evidence of rental income.

sections.title: For Reference Only
sections.content: The statement includes a note that PropertyGoose figures are for reference based on records held in the system. You should confirm all figures with a qualified accountant before submitting a tax return.
